name: Married expatriate with 2 children (30% flat-rate)
description: Married expatriate earning €80,000, 2 children (3 parts), 30% exemption (Article 155B)

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula with 30% impatrié exemption (Article 155B) and family quotient. Social contributions on full gross (€80k). Taxable income: €42,655.20. Family quotient: 3.0 parts (married + 2 children). Quotient: €14,218.40. Tax on quotient: €288.02.
